top_signals.title: India’s Oman Bet Looks Timely As Hormuz Crisis Deepens
top_signals.summary: Late last year, when India and Oman officially signed the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA), there was no war with Iran cutting off the Strait of Hormuz, and the advanced timing of this now is turning out to be more fortuitous than initially expected. The agreement came into effect on June 1st, just in time to give India access to Oman’s trade routes as an alternative to Hormuz.  The pact, ratified by the Omani Sultan in February this year, will see Oman eliminate customs duties on 98% of its tariff lines, giving immediate…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK House of Lords committee calls on Bank of England to reconsider proposed stablecoin restrictions
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Premier League clubs could face legal action over sponsorship deals with crypto firms
top_signals.summary: UK regulator focuses on teams with partnerships with digital assets companies that are not authorised to operate in Britain
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin hits lowest since February as crypto competes for liquidity with blockbuster IPOs
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin continues to decline as stocks hit record highs, with investors also eyeing big IPOs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto CEO says customer meeting requests have surged amid AI security concerns
top_signals.summary: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora said artificial intelligence is increasing demand for cybersecurity solutions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
top_signals.summary: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s Inflation-Hedging Promise in Tatters After 36% Plunge - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s Inflation-Hedging Promise in Tatters After 36% Plunge  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: Crypto turns ‘contrarian bet’ as AI stocks draw investor attention: Bitwise
top_signals.summary: “Investors still believe in crypto, but now that it’s a contrarian bet, they favor fundamentals over vibes,” says Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
top_signals.summary: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Modern robots impress, but are years away from replacing humans
top_signals.summary: AI robotics company Figure posted several videos on X throughout May showcasing its robots performing basic tasks, including cleaning a room and sorting packages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
